headlines.title: U.S. and intelligence allies issue rare joint warning about China
headlines.summary: Nations in the Five Eyes intelligence partnership warned that fake profiles and job offers are targeting military officers, spies, and others with access to classified or sensitive information.

headlines.title: Iranian attack leaves 1 dead, dozens injured in Kuwait
headlines.summary: With peace talks stalled, the U.S. and Iran traded strikes in one of the most intense bouts since the increasingly tenuous ceasefire between the two countries began in April.

headlines.title: Ukraine hits oil refinery as Russia opens St. Petersburg economic forum
headlines.summary: Plumes of thick black smoke rose over St. Petersburg, President Vladimir Putin's hometown, as the Kremlin welcomed international guests for an event often described as Russia's Davos.

headlines.title: Rubio details U.S. demands as Iran peace talks falter
headlines.summary: The secretary of state is testifying publicly to Congress for the first time since the war began, as the regional conflict worsens and lawmakers’ patience runs thin.

headlines.title: Russia hammers Ukrainian cities, killing at least 22
headlines.summary: Moscow has intensified aerial bombing of Ukrainian cities as its battlefield advances have stalled.

headlines.title: Latest US-Iran clashes test ceasefire; Israeli strikes kill 9 in Gaza City
headlines.summary: Lebanon's Health Ministry reports that 3,516 people have now been killed by Israeli attacks on the country since March.

headlines.title: US House passes Iran war powers resolution in rare pushback against Trump
headlines.summary: Four Republicans allied with Democrats to pass bill to rein in Trump, though it is likely to face a presidential veto.

headlines.title: Who is Adam Hamawy? Doctor who served in Gaza is on the path to US Congress
headlines.summary: Hamawy's victory in New Jersey likely to make him a rare US Congress member with firsthand experience in besieged Gaza.

headlines.title: Does Israel have nukes? ‘Most of the world assesses they do,’ says Rubio
headlines.summary: US secretary of state dodges question at congressional hearing on Washington's position on Israel's nuclear programme.

headlines.title: Gunfire erupts in Mogadishu before protests against Somali president’s rule
headlines.summary: Ex-Somali PM Khaire accuses government forces of attacking him before planned antigovernment protests in Mogadishu.

headlines.title: House passes war powers resolution directing Trump to end hostilities with Iran
headlines.summary: The vote marked a rare bipartisan rebuke of the war, but is mostly symbolic. Democrats have been unable to pass a war powers resolution in the Senate, and even if they could it would likely be vetoed.

headlines.title: Senate Republicans start debate on ICE funding package
headlines.summary: The Senate voted along party lines to start debate on a Republican bill to fund immigration enforcement through the end of President Trump's term.

headlines.title: Supreme Court's Alabama redistricting decision could encourage more chaos, experts warn
headlines.summary: The court's repudiation of a lower court decision was only the latest case in which it has played a role in changing the congressional maps for Louisiana, Texas, Virginia, and California.

headlines.title: Trump strips job protections from 8,000 federal workers
headlines.summary: President Trump signed an executive order that puts some 8,000 high-ranking civil servants into a new category of employees who can be fired for any reason.

headlines.title: Trump confirms calling Netanyahu 'crazy,' says they still get along
headlines.summary: The president also acknowledged that he cursed at the Israeli leader in a heated phone call in which he told Benjamin Netanyahu not to bomb the Lebanese capital Beirut.

headlines.title: Technology, participation mark Ethiopia's election
headlines.summary: Regional election observers have praised Ethiopia's adoption of new electoral technologies and strong voter participation in its seventh general election, describing the process as a notable step in the country's efforts to strengthen democratic institutions despite persistent security challenges.

headlines.title: UN elects five new non-permanent Security Council members
headlines.summary: Austria, Portugal, Kyrgyzstan, Trinidad and Tobago, and Zimbabwe were elected non-permanent members of the United Nations Security Council on Wednesday, following voting at the UN General Assembly.

headlines.title: An American educator's decades-long bond with China's deaf community
headlines.summary: Editor's note: China Daily presents the series Friends Afar to tell the stories of people-to-people exchanges between China and other countries. Through the vivid narration of the people in the stories, readers can get a better understanding of a country that is boosting openness.

headlines.title: New Danish government to stand firm over Greenland
headlines.summary: Denmark's Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen has put the future of Greenland at the top of her political agenda after ending months of uncertainty by securing a center-left coalition to govern the country.

headlines.title: Israel, Lebanon agree to implement ceasefire
headlines.summary: WASHINGTON - Israel and Lebanon agreed Wednesday to implement a ceasefire, according to a joint statement released on Wednesday following trilateral negotiations in Washington.

headlines.title: Assam, Meghalaya farmers resume farming in disputed border area after weeks of conflict
headlines.summary: Farmers in Assam and Meghalaya resume farming in a disputed border area after weeks of conflict and brokered peace.

headlines.title: Gujarat launches massive anti-infiltration drive; 362 detained in Operation Delta Hunt
headlines.summary: Gujarat's Operation Delta Hunt detains 362 undocumented immigrants, targeting illegal infiltration and ensuring national security.

headlines.title: Russia delivers fourth squadron of AI-enabled S-400 air defence system
headlines.summary: India strengthens its air defense with the arrival of the fourth AI-enabled S-400 squadron from Russia, enhancing threat management capabilities.

headlines.title: Amid broken ties, Rahul, Kharge hail Karunanidhi on his birth anniversary
headlines.summary: Congress leaders pay tribute to Karunanidhi on his birth anniversary, seeking to mend ties with the DMK amid coalition tensions.

headlines.title: Indian national killed in attack on Kuwait airport
headlines.summary: An Indian national was killed in a Kuwait airport attack, prompting condolences and support from the Indian Embassy.

headlines.title: Stocks slide on flare-up of hostilities
headlines.summary: Reuters: Stocks slide on flare-up of hostilities.

headlines.title: Israel and Lebanon agree to implementation of ceasefire
headlines.summary: Reuters: Israel and Lebanon agree to implementation of ceasefire.

headlines.title: South Korea ruling party sweeps most seats in local elections but faces losing Seoul
headlines.summary: Reuters: South Korea ruling party sweeps most seats in local elections but faces losing Seoul.

headlines.title: TSMC boss upbeat on outlook as AI boom shows no sign of easing
headlines.summary: Reuters: TSMC boss upbeat on outlook as AI boom shows no sign of easing.

headlines.title: US House votes for measure that would end Iran war, in blow to Trump
headlines.summary: Reuters: US House votes for measure that would end Iran war, in blow to Trump.

hackerNews.summary: A mooring used in the Ocean Observatories Initiative is recovered off the coast of Alaska. Rebecca Travis / Woods Hole Oceanographic Institution

hackerNews.summary: From Elixir v1.20, every program is now gradually type checked in search for verified bugs and typing violations.

hackerNews.title: I built a vulnerable app and spent $1,500 seeing if LLMs could hack it
hackerNews.summary: As a part of my work I do security research for various apps and websites. I wanted to see if LLMs could reproduce a common class of exploits I

hackerNews.title: Gemma 4 12B: A unified, encoder-free multimodal model
hackerNews.summary: An overview of Gemma 4 12B, a model designed to bring high-performance multimodal intelligence directly to your laptop.

hackerNews.title: The ways we contain Claude across products
hackerNews.summary: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

hackerNews.title: I was recently diagnosed with anti-NMDA receptor encephalitis
hackerNews.summary: I was recently diagnosed with anti-NMDA receptor encephalitis . It is an autoimmune disorder where your body’s normally helpful antibodies start acting strangely . This leads to inflammation in the brain. This short blog briefly discusses some of my experience and prognosis.

hackerNews.title: Artificial intelligence is not conscious – Ted Chiang
hackerNews.summary: Taken to its logical conclusion, this line of thinking is absurd—and damning.

hackerNews.title: Uber's $1,500/month AI limit is a useful signal for AI tool pricing
hackerNews.summary: I wrote the other day about Uber blowing its 2026 AI budget in four months, and how that wasn't particularly surprising given they would have set that budget in 2025, …

hackerNews.title: DaVinci Resolve 21
hackerNews.summary: Professional video editing, color correction, visual effects and audio post production all in a single application. Free and paid versions for Mac, Windows and Linux.

summarySections.title: News and markets
sentences: Global headlines: U.S. and intelligence allies issue rare joint warning about China (Nations in the Five Eyes intelligence partnership warned that fake profiles and job offers are targeting military officers, spies, and others with access to classified or sensitive information); Iranian attack leaves 1 dead, dozens injured in Kuwait (With peace talks stalled, the U.S. and Iran traded strikes in one of the most intense bouts since the increasingly tenuous ceasefire between the two countries began in April); and Ukraine hits oil refinery as Russia opens St. Petersburg economic forum (Plumes of thick black smoke rose over St. Petersburg, President Vladimir Putin's hometown, as the Kremlin welcomed international guests for an event often described as Russia's Davos).
Markets leaned lower, with 7 of 7 tracked indexes down; Nikkei 225 down 1.90% was the largest move.
Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes.
